name: The Garden
overview: In a beautiful and miraculous garden, best friends Lenny the Lion and Lucy the Lamb embark on exciting adventures filled with faith and fun. Guided by The Boss, they learn valuable life lessons rooted in biblical truth, discovering how God’s word applies to their daily lives. With original songs, engaging stories, and vibrant animation, scripture comes to life, inspiring kids to grow in faith, kindness, and courage as they explore God’s amazing world.
